title: aster flexuosus
intro: Aster flexuosus, also known as White Sage or White Sagebrush, is a shrub-like perennial plant native to North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Aster flexuosus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, salves, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
